title: Apple-Broadcom Win $1.1B CalTech Patent Trial
text: Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL) and Broadcom Inc (NASDAQ: AVGO) persuaded a U.S. appeals court to throw out a jury verdict requiring them to pay $1.1 billion, Reuters reports.  A Los Angeles federal jury found in 2020 that millions of iPhones, iPads, Apple Watches, and other devices using Broadcom chips infringed Caltech's data-transmission patents.

title: Apple, Broadcom win new damages trial in $1.1B CalTech patent case
text: A jury previously ruled that the companies infringed Wi-Fi tech patents.

title: Apple, Broadcom get new damages trial in $1.1 billion CalTech patent case
text: Apple Inc and Broadcom Inc on Friday convinced a U.S. appeals court to throw out a jury verdict requiring them to pay $1.1 billion for infringing California Institute of Technology patents related to Wi-Fi technology used in iPhones and other Apple devices.
